title: ADD CONSTRAINT without NOVALIDATE — validates all rows with exclusive lock
expected_feedback: Critical: Adding FK constraint without ENABLE NOVALIDATE holds an exclusive lock while scanning all 8M rows for validation — this can block DML for minutes. Oracle's safe pattern is two-step: (1) ADD CONSTRAINT ... ENABLE NOVALIDATE takes only a brief exclusive lock and skips row validation, enforcing the constraint only for new DML. (2) MODIFY CONSTRAINT ... VALIDATE performs the row scan with a Row Exclusive lock that does not block concurrent DML. Always pair these for production tables >100K rows.
violated_rule: Constraints use ENABLE NOVALIDATE + VALIDATE two-step
